item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 586
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/XigKo5W Wholesome Post 585 https://imgur.com/gallery/FF8mNWf Wholesome Post 584 https://imgur.com/gallery/9MIkeB4 Wholesome Post 583 https://imgur.com/gallery/xyMeaV0 Wholesome Post 582 https://imgur.com/gallery/DpUwXLD Wholesome Post 581 https://imgur.com/gallery/8m7gWfo Wholesome Post 580 https://imgur.com/gallery/Z7R7KMu Wholesome Post 579
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-ella-regain-her-life-from-her-disability
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/Y4U422F
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay# 9735) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/Y4U422F

item.title: They found a 117 year old wooden parquet floor under the carpet in a Glasgow library.
item.description:
Maryhill library in Glasgow UK.
After restoration. See also the rather nifty curved radiators.
Shiny!
#library #bookporn #glasgow #architecture

item.description: I have since been extubated, but have failed my swallow test and have now been put on a feeding tube. Please get vaccinated because I would more than likely be dead right now without my vaccines.

item.title: They’re basically ensuring she will run away rebel and lie
item.description: “Checkoutmypearlywhites I’m also bisexual and afraid to tell them” this kids gonna have it rough edit: don’t Message me scolding me for going against God and especially saying she’s damned for being bi you psycho maniacs. I operate on my own moral compass and when I meet my maker will duke it out then. Edit: shout out to cute rocker chicks. It is tradition when I make a decent post. Cheers and happy Sunday everyone.

item.title: Bank of America sucks eggs
item.description:
https://fortune.com/2022/01/21/bank-of-america-ceo-great-resignation-brian-moynihan/
TLDR: Bank of America is one of the worst companies to work for. I worked both in the call center and the physical bank as a relationship manager for this shit hole of a bank. Each section has “sales goals” making you force products down customers throats then claiming we’re “finding solutions”. If you didn’t meet your sales goals you were put on corrective action and put at risk of losing your job. The call center had a couple people taken out on stretchers by an ambulance due to stress. Never seen or heard of that in a workplace before. I met my girlfriend there at the bank (she was a teller) and we did all the required HR stuff to be in a relationship. The manager didn’t like that and assigned me to things my job description did not fit,put me behind my sales goals, and also lowered my survey score which put me on edge of losing any bonus I had earned. This manager would tell customers to sit with me for a notary( I’m not a notary) then would tell me they came in to hear about our bank products. The manager was the only one who could do a notary and refused to do one. On top of that the manager also made sexual comments towards my girlfriend, blamed her for issues that were not under her control, and talked crap about her to all the other employees ( employees told us ). HR at Bank of America would handle it right? Wrong. They transferred me to another branch and then swept everything under the rug. My girlfriend then applied to an internal position to get away from the manager - she got approved and was given a start date with a training class. The branch she was working at didn’t have the staff to replace her so they made her work for almost 2 more months there before letting her move on. At this point I had left the bank months ago, and luckily she has too now. Both my managers I knew and liked me told me HR would not allow them to give out personal references for work after I left due to company policy. They gave me an 800 HR phone number to give employers and said they would handle references. My potential employers all told me HR said to contact my direct manager, and HR also would no longer speak to me since I no longer worked for the company. I was top 1% in sales my first year in the company, and always tried to do what was in the best interest of the company and what the customer wanted only. I was no scrub, and I deserved better. Fuck this bank, I hope it crumbles and gets what it deserves. If you value you’re mental health, NEVER work for these monsters.
item.dc:creator: imapotatocheese
